title: Actual planned distance remains separate from tariff distance
purpose: Present a dated official circuit quote without calculating toll from the much longer driven route.

sources.supports: A standard ETC car query for Iikura to Shibakoen via Takaracho returned a 23.3 km route and a JPY 300 daytime quote.
When multiple Shuto-only routes exist, tariff distance is based on the shortest applicable route rather than the actual route.

limitations: The query is dated and is not a permanent toll guarantee.
It does not prove arbitrary lap count or elapsed-time behavior.
The final ETC statement can be affected by a different actual entry, exit, vehicle, time, or network boundary.

then.subject: route_summary.actual_distance_km
then.rationale: The user needs to know how far the selected route actually plans to travel.

then.subject: route_summary.tariff_distance_km
then.rationale: Tariff distance has different meaning and provenance from planned distance.

then.subject: route_summary.tariff_distance_km
then.rationale: The implementation must not calculate the quote from the actual circuit length.

then.subject: route_summary.toll.status
then.rationale: A reproduced result must retain its evidence status rather than becoming an undated guarantee.

then.subject: route_summary.toll.estimated_amount_yen
then.rationale: This is the exact scalar result reproduced for the dated official query.
